allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/vistra.json'\)\)['filings']['recent']; [print\(d['form'][i], d['filingDate'][i], d['accessionNumber'][i], d['primaryDocument'][i]\) for i in range\(8\)]")
Bash(curl -s -A "Power Plant Intel research@example.com" -o .scoping/sec/tickers.json -w "tickers HTTP=%{http_code} bytes=%{size_download}\\n" "https://www.sec.gov/files/company_tickers.json")
Bash(curl -s -A "Power Plant Intel research@example.com" -o .scoping/sec/vistra.json -w "vistra HTTP=%{http_code} bytes=%{size_download}\\n" "https://data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK0001692819.json")
Bash(curl -s -A "Power Plant Intel research@example.com" -o .scoping/sec/talen.json -w "talen HTTP=%{http_code} bytes=%{size_download}\\n" "https://data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK0001990353.json")
Bash(curl -s -A "Power Plant Intel research@example.com" -o .scoping/sec/applied.json -w "applied HTTP=%{http_code} bytes=%{size_download}\\n" "https://data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK0001144879.json")

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml' -H 'Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9' -o .scoping/puct_home.html -w 'PUCT home HTTP=%{http_code} bytes=%{size_download}\\n' https://interchange.puc.texas.gov/)

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Accept: text/html' -o .scoping/puct_search.html -w 'PUCT search HTTP=%{http_code} bytes=%{size_download}\\n' https://interchange.puc.texas.gov/Search/Filings)

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\)' -H 'Accept: text/html' 'https://interchange.puc.texas.gov/search/filings/?UtilityType=A&DateFiledFrom=04%2F01%2F2026&DateFiledTo=04%2F24%2F2026' -o .scoping/puct_search_results.html -w 'HTTP=%{http_code} bytes=%{size_download}\\n')
